title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Reiju, Luffy, Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The SH crew is currently in a very tricky situation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kukuku... you've got to be kidding me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sane person would dare to provoke Mama within her castle grounds?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's an introduce in the treasure room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, that! Also, I ain't brushing my damn teeth tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Aren't you gonna get mad, mama?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haahahaha! Just because some little punk tried to provoke me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not in a million years! Think about it, zeus!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: tomorrow, I'll be getting my hands on both germa jand the tamatebako!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of it all, I'll be getting some sublime wedding cake() to snack on.5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Knowing that it's all going down tomorrow, I feel like I can forgive everything in the world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's not a single reason to be in a sour moon...d.5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tomorrow with be the best! What a happy day to be,5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA! Seems like some intruder is making a ruckus in the treasure room region!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, they'd better not be after my TAMatebako!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy and the others will be spared! Big mom promised!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BARATIE WILL BE FINE AS WELL, AS LONG AS I PROCED WITH THIS MARRIAGE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's truly painful to part ways with my friends...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But nobody will die! This is the most important thing, I have nothing to be disappointed about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I shouldn't be looking this glum...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or pudding- Chan, my only ray of hope, will get anxious again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd be a sad excuse for a man if I did anything to make that girl unhappy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Be your usual self! That's right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I am a cook in love!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, sweet pudding chuwan :) I swear to make you...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
